name: mitii-ai-agent
description: Local-first VS Code AI coding agent with precise repo context and safe Plan/Act workflow

commands.title: Mitii: Migrate Settings from thunder.* to mitii.*

thunder.debug.description: Enable debug logging and show stack traces in UI
thunder.debug.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.telemetry.sessionLogging.description: Write structured JSONL session logs to .mitii/logs/ for debugging and analysis.
thunder.telemetry.sessionLogging.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.telemetry.debugMetrics.description: Capture extra session diagnostics (tool inputs, context sources, LLM step metadata). Process timing is always logged when session logging is on.
thunder.telemetry.debugMetrics.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.telemetry.webhookUrl.description: Optional SIEM/webhook endpoint. When set, sanitized session events are POSTed as JSON.
thunder.telemetry.webhookUrl.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.telemetry.webhookSecret.description: Optional HMAC signing secret for webhook events. Prefer workspace or managed settings for enterprise deployments.
thunder.telemetry.webhookSecret.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.telemetry.webhookTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for telemetry webhook delivery attempts.
thunder.telemetry.webhookTimeoutMs.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.ui.showReasoning.description: Show streamed model reasoning when the provider returns reasoning deltas.
thunder.ui.showReasoning.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.ui.reasoningPreviewMaxChars.description: Maximum reasoning characters shown inline. Set 0 to show all reasoning.
thunder.ui.reasoningPreviewMaxChars.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.enterprise.localProvidersOnly.description: Enterprise policy flag documenting that only local providers should be used for this workspace.
thunder.enterprise.localProvidersOnly.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.enterprise.stripFileContentsFrom.description: Strip file contents and large tool outputs from exported audit packs while preserving metadata.
thunder.enterprise.stripFileContentsFrom.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.enterprise.autoExportAuditPackOn.description: Export a sanitized audit pack automatically to .mitii/audit/ when an agent turn completes.
thunder.enterprise.autoExportAuditPackOn.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.runtime.mode.description: Run the VS Code chat in-process or attach to a running mitii serve daemon.
thunder.runtime.mode.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.runtime.daemonUrl.description: Mitii daemon URL used when thunder.runtime.mode is daemon.
thunder.runtime.daemonUrl.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.runtime.daemonToken.description: Optional bearer token for mitii serve. Prefer SecretStorage or managed settings for enterprise use.
thunder.runtime.daemonToken.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.runtime.autoStartDaemon.description: Automatically start mitii serve when a workspace opens and daemon runtime mode is selected.
thunder.runtime.autoStartDaemon.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.provider.type.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.provider.baseUrl.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.provider.model.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.provider.apiVersion.description: Provider API version. Used by Azure OpenAI when building deployment chat completion URLs.
thunder.provider.apiVersion.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.provider.region.description: Cloud provider region. Used by AWS Bedrock.
thunder.provider.region.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.provider.contextWindow.description: Model context window size. Thunder trims prompts automatically to stay within this limit.
thunder.provider.contextWindow.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.provider.supportsVision.description: Optional override for model vision support. Leave unset to use automatic provider/model detection.
thunder.provider.supportsVision.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.provider.supportsReasoning.description: Optional override for streamed reasoning support. Leave unset to use automatic provider/model detection.
thunder.provider.supportsReasoning.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.indexing.enabled.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.indexing.autoIndexOnOpen.description: Automatically index the workspace when a folder is opened or switched.
thunder.indexing.autoIndexOnOpen.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.indexing.maxFileSizeBytes.description: Max file size for full indexing in bytes. Larger files get signature-only indexing.
thunder.indexing.maxFileSizeBytes.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.indexing.hardSkipSizeBytes.description: Skip files larger than this size entirely (e.g. lockfiles).
thunder.indexing.hardSkipSizeBytes.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.indexing.maxConcurrency.description: Number of files to index in parallel.
thunder.indexing.maxConcurrency.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.indexing.vectorsEnabled.description: Enable semantic vector search. Uses MiniLM when @xenova/transformers is available, hash fallback otherwise.
thunder.indexing.vectorsEnabled.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.indexing.treeSitterEnabled.description: Use tree-sitter WASM for symbol extraction (regex fallback when unavailable)
thunder.indexing.treeSitterEnabled.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.indexing.embeddingProvider.description: Embedding provider when vectors are enabled. minilm uses local @xenova/transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2); falls back to hash if unavailable.
thunder.indexing.embeddingProvider.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.indexing.vectorBackend.description: Vector index storage: sqlite (.mitii/mitii.sqlite) or lancedb (.mitii/lance/) via @lancedb/lancedb
thunder.indexing.vectorBackend.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.context.rerankerEnabled.description: Rerank top retrieval candidates for better context quality (top-20 → top-8)
thunder.context.rerankerEnabled.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.context.rerankerCandidatePool.description: Number of candidates to pass to the reranker
thunder.context.rerankerCandidatePool.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.context.rerankerTopK.description: Number of items to keep after reranking
thunder.context.rerankerTopK.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.context.microTaskRoutingEnabled.description: Route narrow chat requests such as commit messages, changelog entries, and release notes through minimal Git context instead of the full agent loop.
thunder.context.microTaskRoutingEnabled.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.safety.requireApprovalForWrites.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.safety.requireApprovalForShell.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

enumDescriptions: Ask before file edits and mutating shell commands.
Ask before file edits and delete-like shell commands; allow other mutating shell commands.
Ask only before delete-like shell commands; allow file edits and other commands.
Ask before mutating shell commands; allow file edits.
Auto-approve allowed tools and commands. Dangerous commands are still blocked.
thunder.safety.approvalMode.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.safety.autonomyPreset.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.memory.enabled.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.memory.hybridSearchEnabled.description: Use FTS5 + optional vector hybrid search for observations
thunder.memory.hybridSearchEnabled.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.memory.summarizeAfterTask.description: Summarize completed tasks into durable local memory.
thunder.memory.summarizeAfterTask.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.memory.autoMemoryEnabled.description: Write post-task memories to human-readable markdown files in addition to SQLite observations.
thunder.memory.autoMemoryEnabled.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.memory.autoMemoryScope.description: Where markdown auto-memory files are written: user profile, workspace .mitii/auto-memory, or both.
thunder.memory.autoMemoryScope.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.scm.commitMessageEnabled.description: Show Mitii commit-message generation in VS Code Source Control.
thunder.scm.commitMessageEnabled.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.github.issueFetchEnabled.description: Fetch structured GitHub issue context when a chat message contains a github.com owner/repo/issues URL and network access is allowed.
thunder.github.issueFetchEnabled.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.github.issueCommentLimit.description: Maximum number of GitHub issue comments to include in injected issue context.
thunder.github.issueCommentLimit.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.github.tokenRef.description: VS Code SecretStorage key for an optional GitHub token used to fetch private issues. The token itself is not stored in settings.
thunder.github.tokenRef.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.subagentsEnabled.description: Enable subagent tools for typed delegation.
thunder.agent.subagentsEnabled.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.agenticTierOverride.description: Force the agentic capability tier for testing or managed enterprise policy. Auto uses provider/model capabilities.
thunder.agent.agenticTierOverride.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.subagentTypesEnabled.description: Allowed subagent types. Built-ins are research, implementer, reviewer, and verifier; custom .mitii/agents ids may also be listed.
thunder.agent.subagentTypesEnabled.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.maxConcurrentSubagents.description: Maximum subagents allowed to run concurrently in one session.
thunder.agent.maxConcurrentSubagents.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.implementerRequiresScope.description: Require implementer subagents to receive targetFiles or scopeRoot before write tools are available.
thunder.agent.implementerRequiresScope.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.subagentDailyBudget.description: Maximum subagent invocations per session day. 0 means unlimited.
thunder.agent.subagentDailyBudget.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.maxSteps.description: Maximum tool-use steps before the main agent stops or auto-continues.
thunder.agent.maxSteps.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.askMaxSteps.description: Maximum tool-use steps per Ask-mode turn (read-only exploration). Use 16-20 for deep codebase explanations.
thunder.agent.askMaxSteps.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.askDepth.description: Ask-mode exploration depth. Auto chooses by intent; quick is concise; deep explores more before answering.
thunder.agent.askDepth.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.planDepth.description: Plan-mode discovery depth before structured plan compilation. Auto chooses by intent; deep explores more of the codebase.
thunder.agent.planDepth.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.actDepth.description: Agent/Act execution depth. Auto chooses by task route; quick caps direct work, deep allows up to 16 tool steps.
thunder.agent.actDepth.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.askAutoContinue.description: Allow Ask mode to continue when deep exploration reaches its per-round limit.
thunder.agent.askAutoContinue.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.askMaxAutoContinues.description: Maximum automatic continuation rounds for Ask mode.
thunder.agent.askMaxAutoContinues.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.autoContinue.description: Allow the agent to keep working after it reaches the per-round step limit.
thunder.agent.autoContinue.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.maxAutoContinues.description: Maximum number of automatic continuation rounds after the main step limit.
thunder.agent.maxAutoContinues.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.researchAgentMaxSteps.description: Maximum tool-use steps for each read-only research subagent.
thunder.agent.researchAgentMaxSteps.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.researchAgentModel.description: Optional faster model for read-only research subagents. Empty uses the main provider model.
thunder.agent.researchAgentModel.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.researchAgentBaseUrl.description: Optional OpenAI-compatible base URL for the research subagent model. Empty uses thunder.provider.baseUrl.
thunder.agent.researchAgentBaseUrl.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.orchestrationEnabled.description: Enable the multi-step planner in Plan mode. Act mode uses a faster direct agent path by default.
thunder.agent.orchestrationEnabled.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.showDiffPreview.description: Open VS Code diff preview tabs before write_file/apply_patch tool calls. Disabled by default to avoid editor focus changes.
thunder.agent.showDiffPreview.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.verifyCommands.description: Optional shell commands to run after Act-mode completes. Leave empty to auto-discover from package.json scripts (typecheck, lint, test, build) based on touched files.
thunder.agent.verifyCommands.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.verifyOnActComplete.description: After Act-mode runs, discover and run project-appropriate verification (package.json scripts). Uses verifyCommands when set; otherwise auto-discovers.
thunder.agent.verifyOnActComplete.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.planModel.description: Optional model override for Plan mode. Empty uses thunder.provider.model.
thunder.agent.planModel.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.planBaseUrl.description: Optional base URL override for Plan mode.
thunder.agent.planBaseUrl.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.actModel.description: Optional model override for Agent (Act) mode. Empty uses thunder.provider.model.
thunder.agent.actModel.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.actBaseUrl.description: Optional base URL override for Agent (Act) mode.
thunder.agent.actBaseUrl.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.checkpointStrategy.description: Checkpoint strategy before file writes. Git stash when repo available, else file copy.
thunder.agent.checkpointStrategy.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.safety.allowUntrustedWorkspace.description: Allow writes and shell in untrusted workspaces (not recommended).
thunder.safety.allowUntrustedWorkspace.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.mcp.enabled.description: Enable Model Context Protocol servers. Built-in free servers start automatically unless thunder.mcp.preloadBuiltin is false.
thunder.mcp.enabled.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.mcp.preloadBuiltin.description: Preload official free MCP servers (filesystem, memory, sequential-thinking) on extension startup. Toggle individual servers in the Mitii settings UI.
thunder.mcp.preloadBuiltin.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.mcp.builtinServers.description: Default on/off state for built-in MCP servers. Per-session toggles are available in the Mitii Integrations settings tab.
thunder.mcp.builtinServers.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.mcp.maxConcurrentStartup.description: Maximum MCP stdio servers Mitii starts at the same time.
thunder.mcp.maxConcurrentStartup.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.mcp.servers.description: MCP server definitions keyed by server name. Supports stdio servers: { "my-server": { "command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem", "."] } }
thunder.mcp.servers.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.workspace.rootPathOverride.description: Fallback workspace root when no VS Code folder is open. When a folder is open, Mitii always uses that folder and ignores this setting.
thunder.workspace.rootPathOverride.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

mitii.debug.description: Enable debug logging and show stack traces in UI

mitii.telemetry.sessionLogging.description: Write structured JSONL session logs to .mitii/logs/ for debugging and analysis.

mitii.telemetry.debugMetrics.description: Capture extra session diagnostics (tool inputs, context sources, LLM step metadata). Process timing is always logged when session logging is on.

mitii.telemetry.webhookUrl.description: Optional SIEM/webhook endpoint. When set, sanitized session events are POSTed as JSON.

mitii.telemetry.webhookSecret.description: Optional HMAC signing secret for webhook events. Prefer workspace or managed settings for enterprise deployments.

mitii.telemetry.webhookTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for telemetry webhook delivery attempts.

mitii.ui.showReasoning.description: Show streamed model reasoning when the provider returns reasoning deltas.

mitii.ui.reasoningPreviewMaxChars.description: Maximum reasoning characters shown inline. Set 0 to show all reasoning.

mitii.enterprise.localProvidersOnly.description: Enterprise policy flag documenting that only local providers should be used for this workspace.

mitii.enterprise.stripFileContentsFromAu.description: Strip file contents and large tool outputs from exported audit packs while preserving metadata.

mitii.enterprise.autoExportAuditPackOnSe.description: Export a sanitized audit pack automatically to .mitii/audit/ when an agent turn completes.

mitii.runtime.mode.description: Run the VS Code chat in-process or attach to a running mitii serve daemon.

mitii.runtime.daemonUrl.description: Mitii daemon URL used when mitii.runtime.mode is daemon.

mitii.runtime.daemonToken.description: Optional bearer token for mitii serve. Prefer SecretStorage or managed settings for enterprise use.

mitii.runtime.autoStartDaemon.description: Automatically start mitii serve when a workspace opens and daemon runtime mode is selected.

mitii.provider.apiVersion.description: Provider API version. Used by Azure OpenAI when building deployment chat completion URLs.

mitii.provider.region.description: Cloud provider region. Used by AWS Bedrock.

mitii.provider.contextWindow.description: Model context window size. Mitii trims prompts automatically to stay within this limit.

mitii.provider.supportsVision.description: Optional override for model vision support. Leave unset to use automatic provider/model detection.

mitii.provider.supportsReasoning.description: Optional override for streamed reasoning support. Leave unset to use automatic provider/model detection.

mitii.indexing.autoIndexOnOpen.description: Automatically index the workspace when a folder is opened or switched.

mitii.indexing.maxFileSizeBytes.description: Max file size for full indexing in bytes. Larger files get signature-only indexing.

mitii.indexing.hardSkipSizeBytes.description: Skip files larger than this size entirely (e.g. lockfiles).

mitii.indexing.maxConcurrency.description: Number of files to index in parallel.

mitii.indexing.vectorsEnabled.description: Enable semantic vector search. Uses MiniLM when @xenova/transformers is available, hash fallback otherwise.

mitii.indexing.treeSitterEnabled.description: Use tree-sitter WASM for symbol extraction (regex fallback when unavailable)

mitii.indexing.embeddingProvider.description: Embedding provider when vectors are enabled. minilm uses local @xenova/transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2); falls back to hash if unavailable.

mitii.indexing.vectorBackend.description: Vector index storage: sqlite (.mitii/mitii.sqlite) or lancedb (.mitii/lance/) via @lancedb/lancedb

mitii.context.rerankerEnabled.description: Rerank top retrieval candidates for better context quality (top-20 → top-8)

mitii.context.rerankerCandidatePool.description: Number of candidates to pass to the reranker

mitii.context.rerankerTopK.description: Number of items to keep after reranking

mitii.context.microTaskRoutingEnabled.description: Route narrow chat requests such as commit messages, changelog entries, and release notes through minimal Git context instead of the full agent loop.

enumDescriptions: Ask before file edits and mutating shell commands.
Ask before file edits and delete-like shell commands; allow other mutating shell commands.
Ask only before delete-like shell commands; allow file edits and other commands.
Ask before mutating shell commands; allow file edits.
Auto-approve allowed tools and commands. Dangerous commands are still blocked.

mitii.memory.hybridSearchEnabled.description: Use FTS5 + optional vector hybrid search for observations

mitii.memory.summarizeAfterTask.description: Summarize completed tasks into durable local memory.

mitii.memory.autoMemoryEnabled.description: Write post-task memories to human-readable markdown files in addition to SQLite observations.

mitii.memory.autoMemoryScope.description: Where markdown auto-memory files are written: user profile, workspace .mitii/auto-memory, or both.

mitii.scm.commitMessageEnabled.description: Show Mitii commit-message generation in VS Code Source Control.

mitii.github.issueFetchEnabled.description: Fetch structured GitHub issue context when a chat message contains a github.com owner/repo/issues URL and network access is allowed.

mitii.github.issueCommentLimit.description: Maximum number of GitHub issue comments to include in injected issue context.

mitii.github.tokenRef.description: VS Code SecretStorage key for an optional GitHub token used to fetch private issues. The token itself is not stored in settings.

mitii.agent.subagentsEnabled.description: Enable subagent tools for typed delegation.

mitii.agent.agenticTierOverride.description: Force the agentic capability tier for testing or managed enterprise policy. Auto uses provider/model capabilities.

mitii.agent.subagentTypesEnabled.description: Allowed subagent types. Built-ins are research, implementer, reviewer, and verifier; custom .mitii/agents ids may also be listed.

mitii.agent.maxConcurrentSubagents.description: Maximum subagents allowed to run concurrently in one session.

mitii.agent.implementerRequiresScope.description: Require implementer subagents to receive targetFiles or scopeRoot before write tools are available.

mitii.agent.subagentDailyBudget.description: Maximum subagent invocations per session day. 0 means unlimited.

mitii.agent.maxSteps.description: Maximum tool-use steps before the main agent stops or auto-continues.

mitii.agent.askMaxSteps.description: Maximum tool-use steps per Ask-mode turn (read-only exploration). Use 16-20 for deep codebase explanations.

mitii.agent.askDepth.description: Ask-mode exploration depth. Auto chooses by intent; quick is concise; deep explores more before answering.

mitii.agent.planDepth.description: Plan-mode discovery depth before structured plan compilation. Auto chooses by intent; deep explores more of the codebase.

mitii.agent.actDepth.description: Agent/Act execution depth. Auto chooses by task route; quick caps direct work, deep allows up to 16 tool steps.

mitii.agent.askAutoContinue.description: Allow Ask mode to continue when deep exploration reaches its per-round limit.

mitii.agent.askMaxAutoContinues.description: Maximum automatic continuation rounds for Ask mode.

mitii.agent.autoContinue.description: Allow the agent to keep working after it reaches the per-round step limit.

mitii.agent.maxAutoContinues.description: Maximum number of automatic continuation rounds after the main step limit.

mitii.agent.researchAgentMaxSteps.description: Maximum tool-use steps for each read-only research subagent.

mitii.agent.researchAgentModel.description: Optional faster model for read-only research subagents. Empty uses the main provider model.

mitii.agent.researchAgentBaseUrl.description: Optional OpenAI-compatible base URL for the research subagent model. Empty uses mitii.provider.baseUrl.

mitii.agent.orchestrationEnabled.description: Enable the multi-step planner in Plan mode. Act mode uses a faster direct agent path by default.

mitii.agent.showDiffPreview.description: Open VS Code diff preview tabs before write_file/apply_patch tool calls. Disabled by default to avoid editor focus changes.

mitii.agent.verifyCommands.description: Optional shell commands to run after Act-mode completes. Leave empty to auto-discover from package.json scripts (typecheck, lint, test, build) based on touched files.

mitii.agent.verifyOnActComplete.description: After Act-mode runs, discover and run project-appropriate verification (package.json scripts). Uses verifyCommands when set; otherwise auto-discovers.

mitii.agent.planModel.description: Optional model override for Plan mode. Empty uses mitii.provider.model.

mitii.agent.planBaseUrl.description: Optional base URL override for Plan mode.

mitii.agent.actModel.description: Optional model override for Agent (Act) mode. Empty uses mitii.provider.model.

mitii.agent.actBaseUrl.description: Optional base URL override for Agent (Act) mode.

mitii.agent.checkpointStrategy.description: Checkpoint strategy before file writes. Git stash when repo available, else file copy.

mitii.safety.allowUntrustedWorkspace.description: Allow writes and shell in untrusted workspaces (not recommended).

mitii.mcp.enabled.description: Enable Model Context Protocol servers. Built-in free servers start automatically unless mitii.mcp.preloadBuiltin is false.

mitii.mcp.preloadBuiltin.description: Preload official free MCP servers (filesystem, memory, sequential-thinking) on extension startup. Toggle individual servers in the Mitii settings UI.

mitii.mcp.builtinServers.description: Default on/off state for built-in MCP servers. Per-session toggles are available in the Mitii Integrations settings tab.

mitii.mcp.maxConcurrentStartup.description: Maximum MCP stdio servers Mitii starts at the same time.

mitii.mcp.servers.description: MCP server definitions keyed by server name. Supports stdio servers: { "my-server": { "command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem", "."] } }

mitii.workspace.rootPathOverride.description: Fallback workspace root when no VS Code folder is open. When a folder is open, Mitii always uses that folder and ignores this setting.

mitii.indexing.watchDebounceMs.description: Debounce in milliseconds for single-file indexing updates.

mitii.indexing.priorityPaths.description: Relative paths that should be indexed before background backlog work.

mitii.github.autoPrEnabled.description: Allow Mitii workflows to create GitHub pull requests when explicitly requested.

mitii.github.defaultBaseBranch.description: Default target branch for Mitii-created pull requests. Empty uses CLI defaults.

mitii.github.webhookSecret.description: Shared secret used to verify GitHub webhook requests before enqueueing async jobs.

mitii.github.lazyMcpActivation.description: Start GitHub MCP integrations only for requests that need current GitHub data or remote writes.

mitii.github.requireApprovalForRemoteWri.description: Require explicit approval before Mitii creates or mutates GitHub pull requests, issues, workflows, or releases.

mitii.github.workflowDispatchEnabled.description: Allow GitHub Actions workflow dispatch when explicitly requested and approved.

mitii.agent.teamsEnabled.description: Enable persistent team coordination features when a team name is selected.

mitii.enterprise.channelsDisabled.description: Disable Slack, Telegram, Discord, and other channel connectors by policy.

mitii.enterprise.maxParallel.description: Maximum parallel Mitii sessions or teammates allowed by managed enterprise policy.

thunder.indexing.watchDebounceMs.description: Debounce in milliseconds for single-file indexing updates.
thunder.indexing.watchDebounceMs.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.indexing.priorityPaths.description: Relative paths that should be indexed before background backlog work.
thunder.indexing.priorityPaths.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.github.autoPrEnabled.description: Allow Mitii workflows to create GitHub pull requests when explicitly requested.
thunder.github.autoPrEnabled.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.github.defaultBaseBranch.description: Default target branch for Mitii-created pull requests. Empty uses CLI defaults.
thunder.github.defaultBaseBranch.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.github.webhookSecret.description: Shared secret used to verify GitHub webhook requests before enqueueing async jobs.
thunder.github.webhookSecret.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.github.lazyMcpActivation.description: Start GitHub MCP integrations only for requests that need current GitHub data or remote writes.
thunder.github.lazyMcpActivation.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.github.requireApprovalForRemoteW.description: Require explicit approval before Mitii creates or mutates GitHub pull requests, issues, workflows, or releases.
thunder.github.requireApprovalForRemoteW.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.github.workflowDispatchEnabled.description: Allow GitHub Actions workflow dispatch when explicitly requested and approved.
thunder.github.workflowDispatchEnabled.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.agent.teamsEnabled.description: Enable persistent team coordination features when a team name is selected.
thunder.agent.teamsEnabled.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.enterprise.channelsDisabled.description: Disable Slack, Telegram, Discord, and other channel connectors by policy.
thunder.enterprise.channelsDisabled.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

thunder.enterprise.maxParallel.description: Maximum parallel Mitii sessions or teammates allowed by managed enterprise policy.
thunder.enterprise.maxParallel.deprecationMessage: Use the mitii.* setting. thunder.* is kept temporarily for backward compatibility and is planned for removal in v3.0.

scripts.compile: pnpm run compile:extension && pnpm run compile:webview && pnpm run compile:cli
scripts.rebuild:all: pnpm run rebuild:native && pnpm run rebuild:node
scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log('Run pnpm run rebuild:native before F5 if native modules or MiniLM embeddings fail to load')"
scripts.release:prepare: pnpm run compile:cli && node dist/cli.js prepare-release
scripts.preflight: pnpm run release:check-assets && pnpm run lint && pnpm run rebuild:node && pnpm test && pnpm run rebuild:native
scripts.package: pnpm run clean:vsce-deps && pnpm exec vsce package
scripts.package:preflight: pnpm run preflight && pnpm run package
scripts.publish:vsce: pnpm run preflight && pnpm run clean:vsce-deps && pnpm exec vsce publish
scripts.version:patch: pnpm version patch --no-git-tag-version --force && pnpm run readme:sync-version
scripts.version:minor: pnpm version minor --no-git-tag-version --force && pnpm run readme:sync-version
scripts.version:major: pnpm version major --no-git-tag-version --force && pnpm run readme:sync-version
scripts.publish:patch: pnpm run version:patch && pnpm run publish:vsce
scripts.publish:minor: pnpm run version:minor && pnpm run publish:vsce
scripts.publish:major: pnpm run version:major && pnpm run publish:vsce
scripts.release:all: pnpm test && pnpm run package && pnpm run publish:ovsx
